title: More Properties (Widget Properties)
text: More Properties (Widget Properties) Add additional properties for the widget that you are defining, and optionally specify the ValRep for the field. Parameters (if any) are initially supplied by Uniface as default parameters for the widget, or are specified in your system initialization file. Note: Most widgets do not have predefined properties that can be set in this dialog. You can use this dialog to add user-defined properties for customized processing. Fields Widget Parameter Parameter Value Value and Representation How to Click the appropriate New or Delete buttons to add or remove a property or ValRep item. Related Links Widget Reference: Forms and Reports Widgets in Form components determine the appearance and behavior of fields, labels, occurrences, and entities in components running on Windows.
